title: Classes, Private State, Inheritance, and Composition · Behavior Brief: Inheritance Super
summary: Build maintainable scheduling components with explicit invariants and replaceable policies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js inheritance super increment in a policy-driven scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use extends and super with correct construction and method lookup while avoiding fragile base-class contracts.
Use accessors for stable property semantics without hiding expensive work or surprising side effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
